UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Swords card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Swords card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Swords card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Swords card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Swords card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Swords card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the authoritative discernment of Charlemagne, the balanced scales symbolizing justice, and the imperial eagle representing power and vision.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the physical aspects of the image or the details of Charlemagne's crown.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the King of Swords card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, trumpet, dramatic, powerful, majestic, instrumental

CharacterImage.Negative: tyrannical impaler shadowed no scales crooked cartoon crown deformed eagle

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Swords card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Swords card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the destructive and tyrannical nature of Vlad Impaler, as symbolized by the reversed King of Swords.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the regal or majestic aspects of this card, as the reversed orientation suggests a darker interpretation.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the King of Swords card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, brass, minor, introspective, suspenseful, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Swords card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Swords card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight Solomon's tempered insight, his sharp sword representing clear-mindedness, and the open curtain symbolizing his readiness to share wisdom.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the scales as they represent balance but are secondary to Solomon's role in this card.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the King of Swords card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, horns, percussion, minor, contemplative, mystical, cinematic, instrumental
